creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
I have found the issue, it seems to be an ezjail issue and I have no idea how to solve:
jail:
 27592 Applying[/usr/bin/ld] :L to ""
  27593 Result[/usr/bin/ld] of :L is "/usr/bin/ld"
  27594 Applying[/usr/bin/ld] :t to "/usr/bin/ld"
  27595 Result[/usr/bin/ld] of :t is "/basejail/usr/bin/ld.lld"
  27596 lhs = "/basejail/usr/bin/ld.lld", rhs = "/usr/bin/ld.lld", op = ==

jailhost:
Applying[/usr/bin/ld] :L to ""
Result[/usr/bin/ld] of :L is "/usr/bin/ld"
Applying[/usr/bin/ld] :t to "/usr/bin/ld"
Result[/usr/bin/ld] of :t is "/usr/bin/ld.lld"
lhs = "/usr/bin/ld.lld", rhs = "/usr/bin/ld.lld", op = ==
ParseReadLine (1855): 'LDFLAGS+=    -fuse-ld=bfd'
Global:LDFLAGS =  ${SSP_CFLAGS} -fuse-ld=bfd
ParseReadLine (1856): 'BINARY_ALIAS+=   ld=${LD}'

Poudriere jail:
Applying[/usr/bin/ld] :L to ""
Result[/usr/bin/ld] of :L is "/usr/bin/ld"
Applying[/usr/bin/ld] :t to "/usr/bin/ld"
Result[/usr/bin/ld] of :t is "/usr/bin/ld.lld"
lhs = "/usr/bin/ld.lld", rhs = "/usr/bin/ld.lld", op = ==
ParseReadLine (1855): 'LDFLAGS+=        -fuse-ld=bfd'
Global:LDFLAGS =  ${SSP_CFLAGS} -fuse-ld=bfd
ParseReadLine (1856): 'BINARY_ALIAS+=   ld=${LD}'
Global:BINARY_ALIAS = ld=${LD}
lhs = "amd64", rhs = "powerpc64", op = ==

In the jail:
/usr/bin
# realpath ld
/basejail/usr/bin/ld.lld
